docx-templates v4 IMAGE command requires:

commit.message:
perf: batch RAG embeddings into a single inference call (#30)

* feat: add `clean` subcommand and auto-add .shire to .gitignore on init

`shire clean` stops the watch daemon, removes the index DB (+ WAL/SHM
sidecars), and deletes the .shire/ directory. `shire init` now ensures
.shire is listed in .gitignore.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR review feedback for clean subcommand

- Lazy config loading: only parse shire.toml when --db is not provided
- Wait for daemon exit: poll up to 5s after SIGTERM before deleting files
- Move WAL/SHM cleanup outside db_path.exists() check for stale sidecars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* perf: batch RAG embeddings across all changed packages in a single inference call

Previously embed_symbols was called once per changed package, resulting in N
separate ONNX inference calls. Collect all symbols first, then call embed once
with the full batch so fastembed can optimize throughput across the entire set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use spinner instead of progress bar for batched embedding

A progress bar on a single synchronous call jumps 0→100 instantly,
which is misleading UX. A spinner accurately reflects blocking work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

interpretation left to the application domain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 7 critical bugs in rustc_ppc + add multi-function compilation

Major rewrite of the Rust-to-PPC transpiler addressing all issues
found by GPT-5.4 deep review:

- Stack frame: locals start at offset 72 (past PPC linkage area)
- Runtime helpers: _vec_new/_vec_push save/restore LR before bl
- Nested braces: brace_depth tracking prevents early termination
- Expressions: variable refs, function calls, strings, booleans
- Variable lookup: method calls use real stack offsets (not 0)
- Result/Option unwrap: correct tag semantics for each type
- Vec allocation: backing buffer allocated, elements stored properly

New: compile_function_body() shared compiler for all fn blocks,
parameter registration as variables, function call argument passing,
parse_type() generic parameter skipping, library crate support,
if/while/for/loop control flow stubs, infinite loop protection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Fix 7 American→British English spellings across index.njk and zodiac.njk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fail fast on API connection errors instead of retrying for 10 minutes

When the Supermodel API is unreachable, pollJob was retrying connection
errors (connection refused, DNS failure, network down) every 10 seconds
for the full context duration — up to 10 minutes — before giving up.
This blocked the Claude Code Stop hook for the entire outage window.

Connection errors are fundamentally different from job-processing delays:
- "pending"/"processing" status → API is working, polling makes sense
- Connection error → API is unreachable, retrying won't help

Change pollJob to return immediately on connection-level errors so the
Stop hook can call silentExit() and unblock the session without waiting
for the context deadline. 5xx errors, rate limits, and job-in-progress
responses continue to be retried as before.

Co-Authored-By: Grey Newell <greyshipscode@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(trackpad): improve spacebar trackpad feel with acceleration, dead zone, and haptics

Replace the 3-step acceleration with a smooth cosine S-curve (1.0x→2.5x),
add an 8pt dead zone after activation to absorb jitter, increase base
sensitivity to 12pt/char (Apple uses ~12-15pt), add per-character selection
haptics via UISelectionFeedbackGenerator, cap updates at 60fps, and process
X/Y axes independently to support vertical cursor traversal across lines.

Closes #5

commit.message:
fix: reduce stop hook API timeout from 10m to 90s to prevent session blocking

When the Supermodel API is unreachable, pollJob retries failed connections
every 10 seconds. With the previous 10-minute context, the Stop hook would
hang for up to ~10 minutes before giving up — making Claude Code sessions
unusable during API outages.

Reduce the API fetch timeout in runHandler and runWithoutCache to 90 seconds.
Long-running first-time fetches for large repos are already handled by the
background pregen hook (20-minute timeout), so the stop hook can fail fast
and gracefully on API outage without disrupting sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Grey Newell <greyshipscode@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
add circular permutation analysis: S6 CP54 breaks modular architecture

CP analysis tests whether DP-optimal modular decomposition is emergent
from chain contiguity. Three CP variants of protein S6 (1RIS) analyzed:
- CP54 (cuts strongest module): insulation drops 0.995→0.929, 77 contacts switch
- CP13, CP68 (controls): proportionally less disruption
- Three-part argument: energetic mismatch + genuine reorganization + insulation loss

Includes analysis scripts, result data, main figure and SI figure.
README updated with CP section, project structure, and reproduction notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix THETA SWARM ML init: use 'is not None' instead of truthiness check on unfitted RF

sklearn's RandomForestClassifier.__len__ accesses estimators_ which only
exists post-fit. 'if self.object_classifier:' triggered __len__ on an
unfitted model, causing AttributeError and silently nulling both classifiers.

Both classifiers now train and are available for hardware veto.

Also removed stale SQLite cache files (cad_data_cache, orbital_elements_cache)
that were incompatible with shelve's dbm format, eliminating
"Cache read/write error: db type could not be determined" noise.

commit.message:
feat: local assets, login image fix, and DNB title search (#8)

* feat: local assets, login image fix, and DNB title search

- Replace all expired Figma MCP asset URLs with local static images
  (login-cat.png, empty-read.png, empty-toread.png, empty-wishlist.png)
- Add /api/search route: server-side DNB SRU title search with MARC21-xml
  parsing for title/author/ISBN, covers fetched via Google Books ISBN lookup
- Fix bookSearch.ts: use individual intitle:word queries instead of exact
  phrase (improves German title results); add DNB as parallel 3rd provider

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: improve cover fetch for German books with OL + title/author fallbacks

Add two fallback cover sources in /api/search when GB-by-ISBN misses:
1. Open Library by ISBN (good European coverage, fast HEAD check)
2. Google Books by title+author (parallel with OL fallback)

Fallbacks run in parallel to keep latency low.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: cache cover fetches 24h and run GB+OL in parallel to reduce quota usage

The GB free tier (1000 req/day per project) was being exhausted because cover
lookups had no caching. Fix:
- Cache all GB and OL cover fetch calls for 24h (next: { revalidate: 86400 })
- Run GB-by-ISBN and OL-by-ISBN in parallel in the search route (faster + no
  serial waterfall)
- Remove title+author GB fallback in search route (saves quota, rarely helps
  for German-only books anyway)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
